sections.paragraph: இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Verb / வினைச்சொல்
to make fast, to fix; to fasten together, to build by fastening together

ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: A prolonged form of a primary verb (which in its simpler form occurs only as an alternate in certain tenses); to fix (“peg”), that is, (specifically) to set up (a tent): - pitch.
